description.value:
[1 action] Archetype, Concentrate, Fire, Morph

You fully dissolve your body into living fire. For 1 minute, you gain:

  • You can move through other creatures' spaces without triggering reactions. You can't end your movement inside an object or creature.
  • Your movement does not trigger Attacks of Opportunity.
  • You gain immunity to precision damage.
  • Any creature that ends its turn adjacent to you takes 2d8 fire damage (no save).

While in fire form, non-magical physical attacks still pass through you (from your dedication's Logia Intangibility).

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
